entity.summary: Starknet appchain-based decentralized derivatives and spot exchange whose beta mainnet launched in February 2024. Paradex remained active after a January 2026 database-migration and pricing-data error caused unintended liquidations, a chain rollback, and refunds.
entity.notes: February 1 is used as a month-level marker because Paradex's official materials identify the beta mainnet launch as occurring in February 2024 without one definitive public launch day. Earlier closed-beta activity in 2023 is treated as pre-public launch. Existing January 2026 pricing-error, rollback, and refund events are not duplicated.

expected.summary: Starknet-based decentralized perpetuals exchange. In January 2026 a database migration / pricing-data error briefly caused BTC to be priced at zero, triggering unintended liquidations and a rare chain rollback with refunds, but the platform was not permanently shut down.
expected.notes: Do not mark dead. Track as active with critical pricing-error, rollback, and refund/compensation events.

changes.summary: Starknet appchain-based decentralized derivatives and spot exchange whose beta mainnet launched in February 2024. Paradex remained active after a January 2026 database-migration and pricing-data error caused unintended liquidations, a chain rollback, and refunds.
changes.notes: February 1 is used as a month-level marker because Paradex's official materials identify the beta mainnet launch as occurring in February 2024 without one definitive public launch day. Earlier closed-beta activity in 2023 is treated as pre-public launch. Existing January 2026 pricing-error, rollback, and refund events are not duplicated.

events.title: Paradex beta mainnet launched in February 2024
events.description: Paradex's official retrospective identifies February 2024 as the beta mainnet launch period for its Starknet appchain-based decentralized exchange.
events.notes: February 1 is used as a month-level marker; earlier 2023 activity was closed beta.

evidence.title: Introducing DIME: the Native Token of the Paradex Network
evidence.notes: Official retrospective states that Paradex's beta mainnet launched in February.

evidence.title: What is Paradex?
evidence.notes: Current official documentation identifies Paradex as an active Starknet appchain DEX with trading and API interfaces.

evidence.title: Paradex Zero Fee Spot Trading Goes Live
evidence.notes: First-party announcement confirms active spot trading in February 2026.
